name: Charon
description:
Charon is the god who takes souls to the underworld, if you want to get into Elysium, you might wanna pay him! (plz pay him Hades he needs the money...)
____________________________

Ok so, Charon is a cool little guy, and I decided their needs to be more representation of these 'scary' gods/goddesses so here I am! I hope you enjoy this sweetie.
creator: Bird_Grapevine
